pageContext.name: Cad Bane
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Battle Diorama Series Art Scale 1:10 line - Cad Bane!   From Star Wars: The Book of Boba Fett, this Cad Bane Art Scale Statue is a limited edition, highly detailed, and hand-painted Star Wars collectible.  Star Wars fans, don't miss your chance to add the Cad Bane statue to your Star Wars collection!
